title: Assistant Store Manager - Forever 21 India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Forever 21 India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Forever 21 India! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Forever 21 India:
Forever 21 India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Forever 21 India!
